plan.md.anchor: Per-action prose lives at `os/system/actions/<module>/`. Three files per concern, action-prefixed for action-specific text, `module.`-prefixed for module-wide text:
plan.md.author: user

plan-coder.md.text: let's rename the folder to lowercase, that stuff there is depricated
plan-coder.md.anchor: - **`os/system/modules/` already contains legacy PascalCase `*Module` folders** (`AiModule`, `OutputModule`, etc.). New files go into lowercase folders matching `PLang/app/modules/<module>/` — `assert/`, `error/`, `output/`, etc. Do not place anything inside the PascalCase folders. Do not rename them in this pass.
plan-coder.md.author: user

plan-coder.md.text: we can use the opportunity and change from [provider] to [code] in the build warnings
plan-coder.md.anchor: - **PLNG001:** action handler properties must be `Data<T>` or `[Provider] T`. Not relevant to this branch (no new action handlers), but worth knowing if the migration script grows scope.
plan-coder.md.author: user
